heading: Certain property settlements
label: 2516 Certain property settlements
notes: Amendments1984— substituted in introductory text “within the 3-year period beginning on the date 1 year before such agreement is entered into” for “within 2 years thereafter”.Pub. L. 98–369

Effective Date of 1984 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–369, div. A, title IV, § 425(c)(2)98 Stat. 804July 18, 1984“The amendment made by subsection (b) [amending this section] shall apply to transfers after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”July 18, 1984

children.text: to either spouse in settlement of his or her marital or property rights, or
to provide a reasonable allowance for the support of issue of the marriage during minority,
